MCP_ARCHITECTURE.pages: *.php (gamedev.php, resume.php, music.php, patreon.php, live.php, diy.php, blog.php, links.php, services.php)
MCP_ARCHITECTURE.note: Isolated static site with PHP includes, local vendor assets (Bootstrap/FontAwesome), and YAML playlist configs. [DEPRECATION NOTICE: Dec 24, 2025] Shared framework method is now deprecated and NOT used. Site is 100% self-contained.

MCP_FEATURES.playlist_system: YAML-based with responsive columns (gamedev.yaml, gaming.yaml, music.yaml, diy.yaml, live.yaml, patreon.yaml). Format: columns: {xs: 1, sm: 2, md: 3, lg: 3}
MCP_FEATURES.youtube_integration: RSS-only (v3.0) via youtube-grid.js - No API key needed! Server-side caching (10-min TTL) via get-youtube.php proxy. 21 playlists cached in /var/www/jenninexus/storage/cache/youtube/. Real thumbnails from RSS <media:thumbnail> tags. Secrets file exists but NOT used (use_api: false). Complete docs: storage/docs/YOUTUBE-RSS-ARCHITECTURE.md
MCP_FEATURES.youtube_grid_mapping: Dual-function Bootstrap column system: getResponsiveColClasses(object) for YAML responsive configs, getColumnClass(number) for legacy simple format. Priority: responsive object → simple number → fallback
MCP_FEATURES.javascript_files: 11 active (youtube-grid.js v3.0, tag-system.js, theme-toggle.js, martian-games.js, patreon-auth-enhanced.js, back-to-top.js, performance-optimizer.js, polyfills.js, tag-filter-api.js, diy-playlists.js, music-playlists.js)
MCP_FEATURES.css_compilation: Direct CSS management with clean-css-cli minification. SCSS archived. [Isolated Architecture: Dec 24, 2025]
MCP_FEATURES.responsive_design: Mobile-first with clamp() functions. NO inline styles. All padding via custom.css: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 6.25rem) for hero sections.
MCP_FEATURES.platform_branding: Steam, Patreon, YouTube, Twitch color schemes
MCP_FEATURES.RES_ROOT_USAGE: CRITICAL: Always use for all asset paths (CSS, JS, images) in PHP files. This ensures paths work correctly in nested pages (e.g., /game/*.php, /blog/*.php). RES_ROOT is defined in includes/head.php and resolves to '/resources' in production. Example: or

MCP_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.CRITICAL: DO NOT CREATE NEW .md FILES OR SUMMARY DOCUMENTS
MCP_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.daily_session: storage/11-18.md (read first, update as you work)
MCP_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.core_docs: storage/docs/ (only edit existing when info changes)
MCP_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.forbidden: Never create CHANGES.md, SUMMARY.md, UPDATE.md, session-*.md, or any new documentation files
MCP_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.workflow: Read storage/11-18.md → Complete tasks → Update storage/11-18.md → Edit existing docs only if needed

ssh_documentation.CRITICAL: SSH docs stored in C:\Users\Owner\.ssh\ directory ONLY
ssh_documentation.rule: NEVER create project-specific SSH docs - update .ssh directory files instead

MCP_DEV_SERVER.note: Python HTTP server for local development, clean URLs work with .php extension

MCP_BOOTSTRAP_REFERENCE.CRITICAL: Bootstrap directories are REFERENCE ONLY - DO NOT BUILD OR DEPLOY
MCP_BOOTSTRAP_REFERENCE.bootstrap_source: C:\Users\Owner\Projects\Bootstrap\bootstrap-5.3.8\ (official source - reference for SCSS variables, mixins, utilities)
MCP_BOOTSTRAP_REFERENCE.bootstrap_examples: C:\Users\Owner\Projects\Bootstrap\bootstrap-5.3.8-examples\ (official examples - copy patterns, DO NOT deploy)
usage_rules: ✅ Copy code patterns from examples to jenninexus
✅ Look up Bootstrap utilities from source
❌ DO NOT import from these directories
MCP_BOOTSTRAP_REFERENCE.jenninexus_integration: Bootstrap 5.3.8 via LOCAL VENDOR. Custom themes in src/assets/css/. All builds use jenninexus/scripts/ only. [Updated: Dec 24, 2025]

_meta.name: JenniNexus Local Dev
_meta.label: JenniNexus Local (Bootstrap 5.3.8)
_meta.description: Local development environment for JenniNexus Bootstrap 5.3.8 site with PHP includes, YAML playlists, YouTube RSS integration (v3.0), tag system v6.4 (RSS tag detection), and file watcher for auto-rebuild. [ISOLATED ARCHITECTURE - DEC 2025]

critical_rules: Update storage/11-18.md as you complete tasks
Only edit existing docs in storage/docs/ when information changes

MCP_DEPLOYMENT.post_deploy: sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/jenninexus && sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/jenninexus && sudo systemctl reload nginx && sudo systemctl reload php8.3-fpm
